text.tspan: LLM-agnostic runtime where models may reason and request actions, but only the runtime may authorize and execute.
Validates handoffs, loads manifests, applies policy, records evidence, appends
audit events, and dispatches only approved actions.
Developer Pack is active today. Future
Current Developer MVP plus planned DevOps/Admin packs; each family remains narrow and policy checked.
Per-run artifacts with hashes, policy decisions,
proposed/applied patches, test output, trust diagnostics, and
Hash-chained JSONL events for requests, provider responses,
handoffs, actions, approvals, evidence, and trust decisions.
